options.name: --namespace
options.description: URI of the target XML namespace

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: If the target directory exists, delete and overwrite the location

options.description: Determines whether to generate a .csproj project file

options.name: --nullable
options.description: Determines whether to use C# nullable types

arguments.name: COGSLOCATION
arguments.description: Directory where the COGS datamodel is located.

commands.name: publish-dot
commands.description: Publish a dot schema from a COGS data model

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --location
options.description: Directory where the dot.exe file is located. Only used if not using normative and not necessary for windows.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: If the target directory exists, delete and overwrite the location

options.name: --format
options.description: Specifies format for output file. Defaults to svg

options.name: --all
options.description: generate one graph containing all objects. Cannot be used with -s

options.name: --single
options.description: generate a graph for every single item (incoming links and outgoing links). Cannot be used with -a

options.name: --inheritance
options.description: allow inheritance in the graph(s)

options.name: --composite
options.description: show composite types inside item types

arguments.name: COGSLOCATION
arguments.description: Directory where the COGS datamodel is located.

arguments.name: TARGETLOCATION
arguments.description: Directory where the dot schema is generated.

options.description: Output a normative xmi file (2.4.2) instead of xmi 2.5.1. Note: cannot contain a graph element
